rationale: The skill's primary verb is framework detection followed by Auth0 setup, so it reads project manifests (package.json, requirements.txt, angular.json, etc.) via cat/grep/ls subprocesses. It then invokes the auth0 CLI to login (which writes credentials to ~/.config/auth0) and create applications, hitting Auth0's API endpoints. Installation paths invoke brew/scoop/choco package managers, and the skill links to documentation on auth0.com and github.com. Environment variable setup implies writing to .env files in the project.
